programme.desc: Focus provides timely reports and analyses on international news and current affairs from Singapore's perspective.

programme.title: Makan On Wheels S2 - EP 8 / 开着餐车趴趴走 2
programme.desc: The 3 hosts visit a Malay kampung in Marang to learn how to make Terengganu coconut sugar. Afterwards, they travel to Kenyir Lake with artise Danny Koo to experience life on a houseboat, immerse themselves in nature, and learn about the conservation efforts for the Kelah fish. As a token of appreciation for Danny’s warm companionship, they prepare a meal of Hainanese chicken chop for him.

programme.title: Golden Age Talentime 2026 S2 - EP 2 / 黄金年华之斗歌竞艺
programme.desc: After decades devoted to careers and family, these senior contestants enter a new chapter of life. Golden Age Talentime follows their journey as they rediscover long-held music dreams. The brand-new series will continue the team battle concept, creating a platform with greater diversity and excitement for the seniors to have an equal chance to stay till the end.

programme.title: Chill.Hike.Camping - EP 14 / 港女野人奇遇记
programme.desc: The four beautiful hosts embark on an exotic adventure to challenge themselves to explore secret places in the mountains and seas of New Zealand. They climb the sacred volcano of the indigenous Maori people, set foot on the pure ice soil of the highest mountain range, canoe across the mysterious canyon and also look for dolphins.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 252
programme.desc: Nature's Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2 krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 261
programme.desc: This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you're simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 315
programme.desc: Drug-free patches use Far Infrared and acupoint therapy to relieve cold and flu symptoms naturally. The Cold & Flu Patch eases a blocked nose, sinus pressure and chills. The Cough Relief Patch comes in adult and child versions to soothe coughs and calm throat irritation for easier breathing. Safe for daily use, they offer up to 6 hours of comfort for the whole family.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 313
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Mirtogenol Plus+ is a clinically tested eye health formula developed by ophthalmologists and scientists from the UK and Italy. Powered by two powerful antioxidants—Pycnogenol and Mirtoselect—with Citrus Bioflavonoids, it supports healthy eye pressure, improves microcirculation, and helps protect against daily screen-related eye stress. It helps reduce eye fatigue, dryness, and blurre

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 260
programme.desc: South Korea's no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 300
programme.desc: Targets plantar fasciitis: relieves pain, reduces swelling, and stabilises the plantar fascia. With Japanese Bio-Ray technology, the sleeves compress tendons and muscles to boost blood and oxygen circulation. Arch support ensures stability while walking or standing. Non-slip, soft, breathable—comfortable all day under socks or during activity.

programme.title: Kampung Foodsteps S2: Heritage Edition - EP 3 / 脚踏食地之时光印迹
programme.desc: Popular content creator Phei Yong returns to Kelantan, shooting in Bahasa Kelate for the first time, which Darren couldn’t understand. Together, they play Gasing Uri, which leads to humorous moments.

programme.title: Legendary Taste of Sichuan S4 - EP 5 / 川味 第四季(下)
programme.desc: In Legendary Taste of Sichuan S4, the director, Bin Ge and his team will continue to go deep into the countryside, following the smell of cooking, using the camera once again, to interpret the tie or relationship between people and food. In this documentary, we will see how people's life have changed, how food is in tune itself with the human palate, and how people can know or understand the taste

programme.title: Another Wok of Life - EP 13 / 人生酱美味
programme.desc: Business fails to improve. Zhen Bang overcomes his fear of knives and improves on the soup base with Buffett's help. Zhen Bang encourages Buffett to improve on her physique, who then trains for the Muay Thai match with Tian Yong's guidance. Customers return as the restaurant launches a steamboat buffet system. Unfortunately, tensions arise among members of the team, especially Tian Yong and Da Ji.

programme.title: Another Wok of Life - EP 14 / 人生酱美味
programme.desc: Using the hours Zhen Bang owed Buffett as stakes, the two of them compete against each other. Zhen Bang wins but Buffett is upset as she misunderstands his intentions. Zhen Bang's father Ah Hei is caught for molesting, and this affects Zhen Bang's sister, Meng Ting's wedding plans. Ah Hei suffers a heart attack, and the siblings finally meet. Zhen Bang admits that he murdered his brother.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Bond - EP 9 / 寄生

Shi Yuan and Luo Ye Ye are about to face life and death, and this reminded Yun Cong of the time his mother left him. Yun Ze decides to fill Luo Ye Ye's remaining days with nothing but joy, not leaving any regrets.

programme.title: The Unbreakable Bond - EP 10 / 寄生

Yun Cong and Yun Ze happened to pass by, but they did not recognise her. Xiu Huan bumps into Zhao Hua when she was seeking medical treatment at Kang Long hospital. When Zhao Hua calls Yun Cong and tells him about it, Yun Cong could not believe it!

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 14
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

She is forced to pretend to be in a relationship with Sena, a ketoprak street vendor. This fake relationship, meant to protect her reputation, becomes complicated when Sena is actually an undercover intelligence agent on a mission tied to his past—further intensified by conflicts i

programme.title: TURUN RANJANG EPS 16
programme.desc: Albi (Samuel Zylgwyn) is forced to marry his sister-in-law, Naza (Rachquel Nesia), at the request of his father-in-law, Wira. This decision is made for the sake of caring for baby Zia (Faradilla Yoshi), Albi's wife, who falls into a coma after giving birth. This pressured marriage becomes difficult for both Albi and Naza, as they were previously in love with other people.

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 88
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 48
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: SAYAP CINTA TERINDAH EPS 15
programme.desc: It tells the story of Dhani, the firm and responsible eldest son, as he strives to take care of his three younger siblings (David, Ariel, and Isyana) in order to fulfill their father Haris's dream of having a harmonious family. Dhani carries a heavy burden, but he faces serious challenges as his siblings resent him and each of them harbors their own complicated secrets.

programme.desc: Filem ini mengisahkan tentang saudara kembar yang dibesarkan dua keluarga berlainan latar belakang. Seorang begitu jujur dan ikhlas manakala seorang lagi hilang arah tujuan hidup. Ikuti cerita mereka.

programme.title: Bisik Pada Langit
programme.desc: Kisah Wak Selamat yang berkeras untuk melalawat Siti Hajar anak perempuan kesayangannya yang nazak di Australia akibat kemalangan motor. Lakonan Jalil Hamid, Ummi Nazeera, Beto Kushairy, Erwin Dawson, Naim Daniel.

programme.title: Cupcake Mama
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Hanna, isteri dan ibu yang bosan dengan rutin hidup. Dorongan keluarga membawa dia memulakan perniagaan cupcake dari rumah, sambil mengimbangi peranan sebagai isteri, ibu dan usahawan.

programme.title: 5 Minit
programme.desc: A young father, who had his daughter out of wedlock, relives his misspent youth while waiting the infinite 5 minutes to find out whether his own teenage, unmarried daughter is now pregnant.

programme.title: Mr. Cinderella 2
programme.desc: Hubungan cinta Hakimi dan Puteri Megawati mula teruji setelah kehadiran orang ketiga dalam perhubungan mereka membuatkan Sultan mahu memutuskan pertunangan mereka.

programme.title: Sayang Abah (2011)
programme.desc: Kisah Along seorang insan yang pekak dan bisu memungut seorang bayi yang dibuang orang lalu membesarkannya seperti anak sendiri.

programme.title: The Making of Polong
programme.desc: Maria Hadi bertaubat dari ilmu hitam sebelum mati. Tersilap mewariskan polong, makhluk itu membalas dendam dan menyumpah pewarisnya

programme.title: Nujum Pak Belalang
programme.desc: Kehidupan Pak Belalang berubah setelah dia menyamar sebagai ahli nujum dan akhirnya di lantik sebagai ahli nujum negara di Negeri Beringin Rendang.

programme.title: The Making of The Furious
programme.desc: Apabila YouTuber Danial menghina nama arwah bapa mereka, Firdaus dan Hakim bersatu semula. Seorang mencari penebusan, seorang lagi menuntut balas dendam dalam pertempuran yang menentukan nasib legasi The Furious.

programme.title: Bukan Cerita Cinta Cliche
programme.desc: Seorang penulis skrip kisah-kisah cinta tetapi masih bersendirian mengimpikan cinta dalam kehidupan realitinya, lalu dia menyertai sebuah kumpulan terapi untuk berkongsi masalah peribadinya.

programme.title: Bisik Pada Langit
programme.desc: Kisah Wak Selamat yang berkeras untuk melalawat Siti Hajar anak perempuan kesayangannya yang nazak di Australia akibat kemalangan motor. Lakonan Jalil Hamid, Ummi Nazeera, Beto Kushairy, Erwin Dawson, Naim Daniel.

programme.title: Citra Exclusive: Mat So'od
programme.desc: Mat So'od merupakan penglipurlara di kampungnya. Namun berlawanan dengan kerjayanya, Mat So'od merupakan seorang pemurung hampir sepanjang hidupnya.

programme.title: Lemak Kampung Santan
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda kota bernama Ridzuan jatuh cinta dengan gadis kampung bernama Tiqa. Tetapi percintaan mereka tidak semudah yang disangka.

programme.title: Good Boys Go To Heaven Ep10
programme.desc: The Making Of Good Boys Go to Heaven. Highlighting the vision and production behind the show.

programme.title: Sesaat Lebih Ep04
programme.desc: After uncovering Adelia's true identity, Adeef draws closer. Despite doubts and grief, a friendship begins to form until the truth is finally revealed. Will Adelia embrace this truth?

programme.title: Ombak Rindu
programme.desc: Kisah Izzah seorang gadis malang yang dijual sebagai pelacur akhirnya mendapat ihsan dari Hariz pelanggannya yang pertama yang akhirnya menjadi suaminya yang sah. Dibintangi oleh Maya Karin, Aaron Aziz dan Lisa Surihani.

programme.title: Gerak Khas The Movie 2
programme.desc: Inspector Mazlan dan Aleza telah ditugaskan untuk menyiasat salah satu sinidiket dadah yang terbesar di Malaysia yang diketuai oleh Raziman. Mampukah mereka membanteras sindiket haram ini?

programme.title: Special Agent
programme.desc: Won Cheol dipaksa menerima misi untuk menghapuskan VIP yang terlibat dalam membangunkan senjata pemusnah di Korea Utara. Operasi rahsia ejen khas Korea Utara dan Selatan bermula!

programme.title: Cicakman 2 : Planet Hitam
programme.desc: Professor Klon kembali menyerang Cicakman dan mengancam keamanan Metrofulus bersama Rrama. Dibintangi oleh Saiful Apek, Yusry Abdul Halim, Fasha Sandha, Tamara Bleszynski, Adlin Aman Ramli dan AC Mizal.

programme.title: Cinta Kita
programme.desc: Akibat dikecewakan lelaki, Tipah merubah ketrampilan menjadi Dino, tomboy yang kecelaruan identiti sehinggalah Man muncul menyelamatkan cintanya.

programme.title: Mr. Cinderella
programme.desc: Puteri Megawati yang terhutang budi dengan seorang pemuda misteri yang menyelamatkannya dari kemalangan mula mencari pemuda tersebut dengan sebelah kasut yang tertinggal di tempat kejadian.
